description: Authenticated L2 inner-payload dispatch vectors. 'wrapped' is the link inner payload; byte 0 is the dispatch namespace and 'body' is the SCHC packet or routing/control message after that byte.

vectors.name: schc_global_coap
vectors.description: Authenticated L2 SCHC dispatch wrapping a SCHC global CoAP packet whose SCHC rule ID is 0x01.

vectors.name: routing_announce_min
vectors.description: Authenticated L2 routing dispatch wrapping a minimal raw announce whose routing message type is 0x01.

vectors.name: unknown_unwrapped_0x01
vectors.description: A payload beginning with 0x01 is not self-identifying at L2 and must not be treated as announce without dispatch=0x15.
